Configurations

MPV

This section documents the configuration for mpv.

Overview

The configuration consists of two main files:

  • mpv/mpv.conf: core player configuration

  • mpv/input.conf: custom key bindings

These files are intended to be placed in:

  • ~/.config/mpv/

Configuration

mpv.conf

Defines the default behavior of the player, including:

  • Video and audio settings

  • Window behavior

  • Playback options

 1# Graphic and general
 2keep-open=yes
 3stop-screensaver=yes
 4hwdec=auto-safe
 5vo=gpu-next
 6loop-file=inf
 7
 8# Window size
 9fullscreen=no
10autofit=75%x75%							# Size relative to screen
11keepaspect-window=yes 					# Don't allow window to exceed screen
12
13# Cache
14cache=yes  # Enable caching
15cache-secs=10  # Buffer 10 seconds of video
16demuxer-max-bytes=500M  # Increase demuxer cache size
17demuxer-readahead-secs=30  # Read ahead buffer for smoother playback
18
19# Osc
20osd-bar=no
21osd-font-size=20
22osd-font='Source Sans Pro SemiBold'
23osd-color='#CCFFFFFF'
24osd-border-color='#DD322640'
25
26# Audio
27volume=50
28volume-max=200                          # maximum volume in %, everything above 100 results in amplification
29audio-stream-silence                    # fix audio popping on random seek
30audio-file-auto=fuzzy                   # external audio doesn't has to match the file name exactly to autoload
31audio-pitch-correction=yes              # automatically insert scaletempo when playing with higher speed
32
33# SC
34screenshot-format=png
35screenshot-webp-lossless=yes
36screenshot-high-bit-depth=yes
37screenshot-sw=no
38screenshot-template="%f-%wH.%wM.%wS.%wT-#%#00n"
39
40# Sub
41sub-visibility=yes
42sub-font="Source Sans Pro SemiBold"
43sub-font-size=47
44sub-color="#FFFFFFFF"
45sub-border-color="#FF262626"
46sub-border-size=3.2
47sub-shadow-offset=1
48sub-shadow-color="#33000000"
49sub-spacing=0.5
50sub-margin-y=70

input.conf

Defines custom key bindings for interacting with the player.

Typical uses include:

  • Playback control

  • Seeking

  • Toggling options

 1# Default overwritten
 2# Shift+RIGHT frame-step
 3# Shift+LEFT frame-back-step
 4
 5# regular keyboard
 6# Ctrl+RIGHT seek 60 exact
 7# Ctrl+LEFT seek -60 exact
 8# Shift+RIGHT seek 3 exact
 9# Shift+LEFT seek -3 exact
10
11# 60% keyboard
12. seek -10 exact
13- seek 10 exact
14{ seek -3 exact
15} seek 3 exact
16z seek -3 exact
17x seek 3 exact
18Ctrl+. seek -60 exact
19Ctrl+- seek 60 exact
20
21# General
22WHEEL_UP      add volume 2
23WHEEL_DOWN    add volume -2
24UP    add volume 2
25DOWN  add volume -2
26AXIS_UP add volume 2
27AXIS_DOWN add volume -2
28H seek -65
29h seek 65
30v cycle deband
31a cycle audio
32s cycle sub
33i cycle interpolation
34t script-message-to seek_to toggle-seeker
35# + add audio-delay 0.010
36# - add audio-delay -0.010
37F1 add sub-delay -0.1
38F2 add sub-delay +0.1
39F4 cycle-values video-aspect-override "16:9" "4:3" "2.35:1" "-1"
40F     script-binding quality_menu/video_formats_toggle
41Alt+f script-binding quality_menu/audio_formats_toggle
42Ctrl+r script-binding quality_menu/reload
43
44
45Meta+v  script-message-to Mac_Integration OpenFromClipboard
46TAB     script-message-to Mac_Integration ShowFinder
47Ctrl+f  script-message-to Mac_Integration ShowInFinder
48
49# Zoom
50# -           add video-zoom -.25
51# +           add video-zoom .25
52#
53# kp8         add video-pan-y .05
54# kp6         add video-pan-x -.05
55# kp2         add video-pan-y -.05
56# kp4         add video-pan-x .05
57# kp5         set video-pan-x 0; set video-pan-y 0; set video-zoom 0
58#
59# Toggle Playlist with modernx.lua
60p           script-binding modernx_toggle_playlist

Notes

  • Defaults are preferred unless a specific behavior needs to be changed.

  • Key bindings are customized to fit the overall workflow of the system.

  • This configuration integrates with the window manager setup (e.g. floating behavior).
